zh.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯特頓 白 伯頓 武朋 特倫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins於1432年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯特頓時，他的父親John Higgins32歲，母親Agnes Burguillion35歲。他於1457年與Sarah Wilde在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯特頓 白 伯頓 武朋 特倫特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年在英國斯塔福爾斯特頓享年50歲。

zh-hans.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯特頓 白 伯頓 武朋 特倫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins于1432年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯特頓时，他的父亲John Higgins32岁，母亲Agnes Burguillion35岁。他于1457年与Sarah Wilde在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯特頓 白 伯頓 武朋 特倫特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年在英国斯塔福爾斯特頓享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

nameMeanings.name: Wainwright
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cheshire): occupational name for a maker of carts or wagons, from Middle English wain-wright ‘wagon-builder, cart-maker’ (Old English wægn-wyrhta).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins was born in 1432, in Stretton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Higgins, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Burguillion, was 35. He married Sarah Wilde in 1457, in Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1482, in Stretton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 50.

Il a épousé Sarah Wilde en 1457, à Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1482, à Stretton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.Stretton by Burton upon Trent, Staffords: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴 비 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Wainwright Higgins(이)가 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Higgins(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Burguillion(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1457년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴 비 버턴 업 트렌트에서 Sarah Wilde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스트레턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
